raw_transcript: Nothing but clear broth, Jell-O, and water until the inflammation settles down. After the pain is completely gone, we'll slowly introduce a high-fiber diet to prevent future flares. But during the flare, fiber is actually your enemy.
final_corrected_note: Nothing but clear broth, Jell-O, and water until the inflammation settles down. After the pain is completely gone, we'll slowly introduce a high-fiber diet to prevent future flares. But during the flare, fiber is actually your enemy.
